---
title: "IPUMS_data_cleaning"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(tigris)
```

```{r}
lines <- read_lines("nhgis0001_ds271_2024_county_codebook.txt")
IPUMS_data <- read_csv("nhgis0001_ds271_2024_county.csv")
NRHP_LHAT <- read_csv("../data/Theaters/NRHP_LHAT_joined.csv")
colleges <- read_csv("../data/Colleges/joined_colleges.csv")
auto_ev_facilities <- read_csv("../data/Industrial Institutions/auto_ev_map.csv")
```

```{r}
# adding a GEOID column
IPUMS_data <- IPUMS_data %>%
  mutate(GEOID = substr(
    GEO_ID, 
    nchar(GEO_ID) - 4, 
    nchar(GEO_ID)))
```


```{r}
# writing function to join IPUMS variables with institution datasets

join_ipums <- function(data, lon, lat, counties, ipums) {

  # convert to sf object
  data_sf <- data %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[lon]]),
      !is.na(.data[[lat]])
    ) %>%
    st_as_sf(
      coords = c(lon, lat),
      crs = 4326,
      remove = FALSE
    )

  # match CRS
  data_sf <- st_transform(data_sf, st_crs(counties))

  # spatial join to counties
  data_county <- st_join(
    data_sf,
    counties,
    join = st_within
  )

  # join NHGIS/IPUMS demographics
  data_ipums <- data_county %>%
    left_join(ipums, by = "GEOID")

  return(data_ipums)
}
```


```{r}
theaters_IPUMS <- join_ipums(
  NRHP_LHAT,
  lon = "longitude",
  lat = "latitude",
  counties = counties,
  ipums = IPUMS_data
)

colleges_IPUMS <- join_ipums(
  colleges,
  lon = "Longitude",
  lat = "Latitude",
  counties = counties,
  ipums = IPUMS_data
)

auto_ev_IPUMS <- join_ipums(
  auto_ev_facilities,
  lon = "longitude",
  lat = "latitude",
  counties = counties,
  ipums = IPUMS_data
)
```
